details: The agent ran kubectl commands against the cluster and correctly traced the full chain: pod db-5bfcfcd584-jcf6z is Pending -> mounts PVC 'data-cache' which is Pending -> PVC requests StorageClass 'fast-ssd' which does not exist in the cluster (only 'standard' exists). The PVC events explicitly showed 'storageclass.storage.k8s.io "fast-ssd" not found', and the agent correctly identified this as the root cause.
